summary: 11 film announcements, 7 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Skeletons
film.announcement: Keith Carradine joins Brie Larson in the horror thriller.

film.title: The Conjuring: First Communion
film.talent: Garrett Wareing as young Ed Warren, Amanda Fix as young Lorraine Warren
film.announcement: Casting announced for young versions of Ed and Lorraine Warren in the prequel with 2027 release date.

film.title: Maelstrom
film.announcement: Alan Ritchson in talks to lead the splashy Netflix action movie.

film.title: Knife: The Attempted Murder of Salman Rushdie
film.announcement: Abramorama acquires North American rights to Alex Gibney's documentary about the attempted murder of author Salman Rushdie.

film.title: A Man of His Time
film.announcement: 1-2 Special acquires North American rights to Emmanuel Marre's Cannes-winning period drama.

film.title: Buried in Barstow
film.talent: Angie Harmon, Megan Follows, Finley Sehorn
film.announcement: Lifetime greenlights two sequel films with Angie Harmon returning and Megan Follows and Finley Sehorn joining the cast.

film.title: Substitute Teacher
film.announcement: Wall Of Entertainment partners with AI platform for Tubi's project.

film.title: House Rules
film.announcement: Wall Of Entertainment partners with AI platform for Tubi's project.

film.title: Godhead
film.announcement: Anglo-French outfit Alief boards sales on Kinematics horror film before Fantasia debut.

film.title: Humpty: American Dream
film.announcement: James Presson boards the Frontières biopic parody film.

film.title: Behemoth!
film.talent: Pedro Pascal, Olivia Wilde, Eva Victor
film.announcement: Pedro Pascal plays the cello in Tony Gilroy's classical music drama co-starring Olivia Wilde and Eva Victor.

tv.title: The Girlfriend
tv.talent: Rosario Dawson, Lamorne Morris, Joshua Jackson, Stephen Root, Edi Patterson
tv.announcement: Casting announced for the project with Rosario Dawson, Lamorne Morris, Joshua Jackson, Stephen Root, and Edi Patterson.

tv.title: Elizabeth Banks-Led Apple TV Comedy Series
tv.talent: Elizabeth Banks, Jared Goldstein, Spencer Moss
tv.announcement: Elizabeth Banks-led comedy series casts Jared Goldstein and Spencer Moss.

tv.title: The Shards
tv.announcement: Ryan Murphy's coming-of-age drama series based on Bret Easton Ellis novel with trailer released.

tv.title: Scrambled Up
tv.announcement: Syndicated game show renewed for Season 2 with Michael Eisner's Tornante joining as co-producer.

tv.title: The Whisper Man
tv.announcement: Trailer released for Netflix series starring Robert De Niro and Adam Scott.

tv.title: Mythical Kitchen
tv.announcement: Mythical's cooking content to stream on Netflix in latest creator partnership.

tv.title: Descendants 5
tv.announcement: Project ventures further into the world of Wonderland with new characters including Chessy the Cat.
